title: aeschynanthus praelongus
intro: Aeschynanthus praelongus, also known as the dragon flower, is a plant species belonging to the Gesneriaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus praelongus include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
